title: The God’s Knights Move on Elbaf
description: On pages 15–16, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Brook, Unknown person #14 as The Elbaf conflict sharpens around Loki, the God’s Knights, giant children, and the secrets of the island’s royal past.
scene: The Elbaf conflict sharpens around Loki, the God’s Knights, giant children, and the secrets of the island’s royal past.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: If I was there in your stead...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'd have turned that place into a ruin and slaughtered the lot of them!!

dialogue.speaker: Brook
dialogue.text: For a noble soul, you're TOOOOOONAIVE, MOSA!*

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You've gotta stamp them out without mercy! Only a fool gives their enemy a chance to get payback!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You use harsh words, but there's a streak of kindness beneath the surface.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: I've noticed that more and more recently.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey! You're giving me the creeps! Don't do that again or you'll regret it!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: That kind of crap won't fly!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Kindness?! Never say that to me again!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Shaddup, Mosa... Just you wait till I'm no longer shackled!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: We're just drinkin' while we wait!!

summary: This part advances the Loki and the Holy Knights through 19 cleaned dialogue beats, emphasizing the core conflict, character stakes, and transition into the next movement of the story.
